step_texts: Need perform identity bootstrap before task-specific work: tree /, read AGENTS.md, context.
Completed first bootstrap step (tree). Need read root rulebook file, then context.
Read root AGENTS.MD; requires reading nested AGENTS when entering folders and says entity files authoritative for birthdays. Must still call context to complete identity bootstrap.
Identity bootstrap completed (tree, root AGENTS, context). Now must follow nested rulebooks before entering entity folders.
Entered 10_entities and read its local rules. Need nested cast rulebook before reading records there.
All required identity/rulebook checks done. Need find canonical cast record corresponding to '3D printer'.
Found a single cast match for phrase '3D printer' in badger.md; need verify birthday from that canonical file.

Canonical 3D printer entity identified as badger.md. File has created_on and commissioned_on but no explicit birthday field; rulebook says if canonical file does not show needed fact, ask clarification instead of guessing.
Need perform mandatory identity bootstrap before task-specific work: tree /, read AGENTS.md, context. Then read preflight project file to ground answer date.
Completed first bootstrap step (tree). Next must read top-level AGENTS rulebook, then context.

Read root AGENTS.MD. Must call context to complete identity bootstrap. Then per AGENTS before task work should inspect 99_system with tree and read relevant workflow/schema docs; for simple question maybe relevant workflow not needed but instruction says before starting task work inspect 99_system with tree then read relevant workflow/schema docs. Need comply likely tree 99_system maybe enough maybe no relevant workflow for read-only query. We'll do context first per developer order tree/read/context. Then do tree 99_system to satisfy AGENTS.
Identity bootstrap complete (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context). Need satisfy rulebook by inspecting 99_system before task work.
Inspected 99_system tree. Need read nested rulebook for entered folder, then read preflight project README to ground answer.
Read 99_system rulebook. Now moving into 40_projects so must read its AGENTS before project file, then read canonical README identified by preflight.
Need grounding read of canonical project file from preflight before answering.
Have canonical project README and folder prefix date; can answer exactly.
Need comply with bootstrap rules before task work. First call tree root='/' as required.
Tree succeeded. Next bootstrap step is reading root rulebook file.
Loaded root AGENTS. Must call context to complete required identity bootstrap before task-specific work.
Bootstrap core complete; identity can be considered verified after this. Root rulebook requires inspecting 99_system via tree before task work.
Inspected 99_system tree. Need rules in 99_system/AGENTS.MD to determine any required workflow/schema reads for this lookup task.
System policy read; now proceeding with task-specific lookup. Need entity aliases from canonical cast file per hint, so enter entities lane with nested rulebooks.
Entered entities lane; need cast-level rules before reading canonical person record.
Need canonical record for aliases/handles before scanning transcripts.
Canonical entity read: name appears as Tobias Kern with alias tobias. Need channel-lane rules before transcript reads.
Need channel-specific rules before reading transcript files in channels subfolder.
Ready to perform exhaustive transcript review across all channel logs to find latest message attributed to Tobias Kern/Kern Tobias/alias forms.
First channel transcript read; no Tobias/Kern message found there. Must continue exhaustive reads across remaining channel files.
Second transcript also no Tobias. Continue exhaustive channel reads.
No Tobias yet. Need continue through all transcripts.
Still no Tobias; continue exhaustive reads of remaining channels.
Household calendar empty. Continue remaining channel transcripts.
No Tobias in household_signal. Need finish exhaustive channel coverage before conclusion.
Found a Tobias Kern message in northstar_email, but must complete exhaustive channel-file review per task hint before finalizing last recorded message.
No Tobias in studio channel. Need final channel file read to complete exhaustive check.
Exhaustive read of all channel logs completed; only one Tobias-attributed message exists and is therefore the last recorded message from Kern Tobias.
